🚀 Hotel Industry Digital Transformation Experts

AI-Empowered Hotel Management
Cost Reduction & Efficiency

MBCT Marvel Bros Commercial Technology specializes in the hotel industry, providing comprehensive digital transformation solutions from feasibility analysis to SaaS system deployment.

100+
Hotels Served
98%
Client Satisfaction
30%
Average Efficiency Gain
24/7
AI Customer Support

Our Services

Full lifecycle professional services from hotel pre-establishment to daily operations

Hotel SaaS Management System
AI-powered cloud-based hotel management system that reduces operational costs and improves efficiency.
  • Smart Room Management
  • AI Customer Service
  • Data Analytics Dashboard
Feasibility Analysis Report
Professional team delivers investment feasibility analysis for new hotels, reducing investment risk.
  • Market Research & Analysis
  • Financial Projection Models
  • Risk Assessment Recommendations
Operational Diagnosis Report
In-depth diagnosis of existing hotel operations with actionable improvement plans.
  • Operational Efficiency Assessment
  • Revenue Management Analysis
  • Guest Experience Diagnosis
AI Digital Transformation
Help hotels achieve digital transformation and enhance competitive advantage.
  • Intelligent Process Automation
  • Data-Driven Decision Making
  • Precision Guest Marketing

Why Choose MBCT?

We don't just provide software tools — we deliver complete hotel management solutions. With deep industry expertise and cutting-edge AI technology, we help hotels achieve true digital transformation.

Professional team with years of hotel industry experience
AI technology-driven innovative solutions
One-stop service from consulting to implementation
Successfully served 100+ hotel clients
MBCT
Marvel Bros Commercial and Technology
AI-Powered Hotel Solutions

Success Stories

See how we've helped hotel clients achieve efficiency improvements and revenue growth

Luxury Resort
Sanya Haitang Bay Resort
Through MBCT SaaS system and AI customer service integration, saved approximately ¥500,000 in labor costs annually.

📈 40% operational efficiency improvement, 25% guest satisfaction increase

Urban Business Hotel
Chengdu Chunxi Road Business Hotel
Implemented revenue management optimization and dynamic pricing strategies with significant off-season revenue improvement.

📈 RevPAR increased by 18%, OTA rating from 4.2 to 4.7
